components.name: potassium bicarbonate
components.evidence: The mineral medium contained (per liter): 0.5-1.5 g KHCO3 (added as required to maintain denitrifying activity), 0.05 g KH2PO4, 0.3 g CaCl2.2H2O, 0.2 g MgSO4.7H2O, 0.425 g NaNO3 (5 mM).

components.name: monopotassium phosphate
components.evidence: The mineral medium contained (per liter) ... 0.05 g KH2PO4 ...

components.name: calcium chloride dihydrate
components.evidence: The mineral medium contained (per liter) ... 0.3 g CaCl2.2H2O ...

components.name: magnesium sulfate heptahydrate
components.evidence: The mineral medium contained (per liter) ... 0.2 g MgSO4.7H2O ...

components.name: sodium nitrate
components.evidence: 0.425 g NaNO3 (5 mM). PMC10811727: 'A concentrated stock solution (80 g NO3-N l-1) was manually pulse-fed to the reactors to replenish NO3-.'

components.name: ferrous sulfate heptahydrate
components.concentration: 2.085 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: The acidic (100 mM HCl) trace element solution contained (per liter) 2.085 g FeSO4.7H2O, 0.068 g ZnSO4.7H2O, 0.12 g CoCl2.6H2O, 0.5 g MnCl2.4H2O, 0.32 g CuSO4, 0.095 g NiCl2.6H2O, and 0.014 g H3BO3 (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: zinc sulfate heptahydrate
components.concentration: 0.068 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.068 g ZnSO4.7H2O ... (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: cobalt chloride hexahydrate
components.concentration: 0.12 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.12 g CoCl2.6H2O ... (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: manganese chloride tetrahydrate
components.concentration: 0.5 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.5 g MnCl2.4H2O ... (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: copper sulfate
components.concentration: 0.32 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.32 g CuSO4 ... (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: nickel chloride hexahydrate
components.concentration: 0.095 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.095 g NiCl2.6H2O ... (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: boric acid
components.concentration: 0.014 g/L in acidic trace stock, 0.5 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... and 0.014 g H3BO3 (0.5 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: sodium molybdate
components.concentration: 0.242 g/L in alkaline trace stock, 0.2 mL/L added
components.evidence: The alkaline (10 mM NaOH) trace element solution contained (per liter) 0.067 g SeO2, 0.050 g Na2WO4.2H2O, and 0.242 g Na2MoO4 (0.2 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: selenium dioxide
components.concentration: 0.067 g/L in alkaline trace stock, 0.2 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.067 g SeO2 ... (0.2 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: sodium tungstate dihydrate
components.concentration: 0.050 g/L in alkaline trace stock, 0.2 mL/L added
components.evidence: ... 0.050 g Na2WO4.2H2O ... (0.2 ml added per liter medium).

components.name: ethane
components.evidence: The ethane/butane reactors were periodically flushed with pure ethane/butane gas (99.99%, Coregas, Australia) to maintain the ethane/butane partial pressure in the headspace between 0.9 and 1.2 atm.

components.name: carbon dioxide
components.evidence: KHCO3 buffer establishes a bicarbonate-CO2 system; CO2 is also the oxidation end product ('CO2 was the dominant end product from C2H6 and C4H10 oxidation').

media.base_medium: Anoxic NC10-type mineral medium (Ettwig et al. 2009, AEM), cited via ref 16 (Wu et al. 2022, Nat Commun, PMC9576796)

sources_chased.what: ref 16 = Wu et al. 2022 (PMC9576796), the 'anoxic mineral medium [16]' cited by PMC10811727
added: No recipe of its own - it defers to Ettwig 2009 ('anoxic synthetic medium prepared as described previously')

sources_chased.what: base recipe = Ettwig et al. 2009 (PMC2687271), full NC10 anaerobic mineral medium + acidic and alkaline trace-element solutions
added: confirmed all bulk salts and 6 acidic-solution trace metals + Mo

media.notes: The paper gives only the modification (nitrate + ethane) and cites the medium as ref 16; ref 16 in turn cites Ettwig 2009, which supplies the complete NC10 mineral medium. All conc_mM values already in the target match Ettwig 2009 exactly, but tungsten (Na2WO4) was entirely absent from the target and boron, selenium, bicarbonate and ethane were unmapped. No vitamins or added chemical reductant (cysteine/sulfide) are part of this medium; anoxia is maintained by inert gas/substrate sparging and the nitrate serves as electron acceptor.
